steps.title: Find the faster speed
steps.content:
Object $M$ travels $5x$ inches in $y$ seconds, so its speed is
$$
\frac{5x}{y}
$$
Object $M$ is half as fast as object $N$, so object $N$ has speed
$$
2(\frac{5x}{y})=\frac{10x}{y}
$$

steps.title: Divide distance by speed
steps.content: Time equals distance divided by speed. For object $N$ to travel $40x$ inches, $$ \frac{40x}{\frac{10x}{y}}=40x\cdot\frac{y}{10x}=4y $$ The answer is B.
